name: pi-chinese-motivation
description_en: Plays motivational music while Chinese-origin models (DeepSeek, MiMo, Kimi, etc.) are thinking — with dynamic volume ramp and bit-crusher distortion that gets worse the longer the model thinks.
description_zh: 当中国起源的模型（DeepSeek、MiMo、Kimi 等）思考时播放激励音乐 — 具有动态音量渐增和位粉碎失真，模型思考时间越长失真越严重
